buildCommand: if ! command -v flutter >/dev/null 2>&1; then git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable .flutter-sdk; fi && FLUTTER_BIN=$(command -v flutter || echo "$PWD/.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter") && "$FLUTTER_BIN" config --enable-web && "$FLUTTER_BIN" pub get && "$FLUTTER_BIN" build web --release && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R build/web/. dist/
